lede: A look at September 14 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Emperor Daozong of Liao and Alexander von Humboldt, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: 2008 financial crisis
events.desc: Prelude to the 2008 financial crisis: Northern Rock bank experiences the first bank run in the United Kingdom in 150 years.

events.title: Kumba Yala
events.desc: Bissau-Guinean President Kumba Ialá is ousted from power in a bloodless military coup led by General Veríssimo Correia Seabra.

events.title: Kiribati
events.desc: Kiribati, Nauru and Tonga join the United Nations.

events.title: Bosnia and Herzegovina
events.desc: The Constitutional Court of Bosnia and Herzegovina declares the breakaway Croatian Republic of Herzeg-Bosnia to be illegal.

events.title: Ip massacre
events.desc: Ip massacre: The Hungarian Army, supported by local Hungarians, kill 158 Romanian civilians in Ip, Sălaj, a village in Northern Transylvania, an act of ethnic cleansing.

events.title: World War II
events.desc: World War II: The Estonian military boards the Polish submarine ORP Orzeł in Tallinn, sparking a diplomatic incident that the Soviet Union will later use to justify the annexation of Estonia.

events.title: HMAS AE1
events.desc: HMAS AE1, the Royal Australian Navy's first submarine, is lost at sea with all hands near East New Britain, Papua New Guinea.

events.title: American Civil War
events.desc: American Civil War: The Battle of South Mountain, part of the Maryland Campaign, is fought.

events.title: António Manoel de Vilhena
events.desc: Grand Master António Manoel de Vilhena lays down the first stone of Fort Manoel in Malta.

events.title: AD 81
events.desc: Domitian became Emperor of the Roman Empire upon the death of his brother Titus.

births.name: Robert Cecil, Viscount Cecil of Chelwood
births.line: 1st Viscount Cecil of Chelwood, English lawyer and politician, Under-Secretary of State for Foreign Affairs, Nobel Prize laureate

deaths.text: Grace Kelly, American-Monegasque actress; Princess of Monaco
Nur Muhammad Taraki, Afghan journalist and politician, 3rd President of Afghanistan
Giovanni Domenico Cassini, Italian-French mathematician, astronomer, and engineer
Yang You, emperor of the Sui Dynasty

observances.text: Christian feast day: Aelia Flaccilla (Eastern Orthodox Church)
Christian feast day: Cormac mac Cuilennáin (or of Cashel)
Christian feast day: Feast of the Cross (Christianity) Elevation of the Holy Cross (Eastern Orthodox)
Christian feast day: Lord of Miracles of Buga
Christian feast day: Gabriel-Taurin Dufresse (one of the Martyr Saints of China)
